name: kanban-tui
description: Customizable terminal-based Kanban task manager built with Textual (Python TUI framework). Supports SQLite, Jira, and Claude task backends. Includes MCP server and CLI interface enabling AI agent co-op mode. Available on PyPI.

findings_summary.notes: Mature, well-established Python project (created Aug 2024) with MIT license, PyPI package, coverage badges, and active development (4 open issues). Repository is a full Python application — not a SKILL.md-based agent skill in the traditional sense, but provides an MCP server and CLI for agent integration. Source is clean with standard Python package layout (src/kanban_tui/). No hooks, no install scripts, no hidden scripts. Uses standard dependencies (Textual, SQLite, Pydantic). High confidence this does what it claims. Downloadable via uvx, standard install. No dangerous patterns identified. This is a legitimate productivity tool with AI-agent integration capabilities.
